goal: bundled_ideal_subset[R](ideal_indexed_sum[R, I](family), c) = forall(x0: R) { ideal_indexed_sum[R, I](family).contains(x0) implies c.contains(x0) }

bundled_ideal_subset[R](ideal_indexed_sum[R, I](family), c)
